data.eyebrow: Marketing Services for Ecommerce Brands on HubSpot
data.title:
Marketing services scoped to outcomes,
not hours.
paragraphs: Most marketing agencies sell you hours, points, or deliverables. We sell outcomes. You tell us what the business needs (more pipeline, more revenue, more visibility) and we run the marketing system that gets you there. Content production, distribution, attribution, and optimization, all tied to the metric that matters.

• Outcome scorecard tied to your revenue goal
  • Pipeline gap analysis: where leads are leaking
  • Content gap analysis: what's missing in your funnel
  • AI search visibility audit (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)
  • HubSpot attribution check (or setup plan if you're not on it)
  • Prioritized fix list ranked by revenue impact
  • 30-minute call with an ecommerce marketing expert
  • Written deliverable you can act on immediately

data.title: Why Marketing Stops Driving Revenue
data.subtitle: These are the four things that break ecommerce marketing. If any of these sound familiar, your marketing services need a different model.

items.title: You Can't Tie Content to Revenue
items.text: You publish blog posts, send emails, run social, and your traffic looks fine. But when leadership asks which marketing dollar drove which sale, you don't have the answer. Without HubSpot attribution wired into content, every dollar is a guess.

items.title: AI Content Made Everything Sound the Same
items.text: Your competitors are publishing AI-generated blog posts and product descriptions. So are you. The content is fine. It's also identical to everyone else's. When everything sounds the same, nothing converts. You need content that actually has a point of view.

items.title: You're Invisible in AI Search
items.text: Buyers ask ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity for recommendations before they ever search Google. If you're not showing up there, you're losing the deal before it starts. Most agencies aren't optimizing for AI search yet. We are.

items.title: You're Buying Hours, Not Outcomes
items.text: Most agencies bill by hours, points, or retainers tied to deliverables. So you get a fixed amount of content, regardless of whether it's working. We scope to the outcome instead. If it takes 10 posts to hit the goal, that's what we publish. If it takes 30, that's what we publish.

data.title: Is This the Right Fit?
data.subtitle: Our marketing services aren't for everyone. They work best for ecommerce brands that want a system tied to revenue, not another vendor on the marketing stack.

fits.text: You're an ecommerce brand doing $1M+ in revenue
You want marketing tied to revenue, not just traffic
You're on HubSpot or want to be (we set it up if you don't have it)
You want to show up in AI search, not just Google
You need a team that owns the outcome, not a vendor that ships hours

not_fits.text: You just need a freelance writer for a few blog posts
You're looking for the cheapest content option
You don't have product-market fit yet

data.title: What You Actually Get
data.subtitle: Not deliverables. Outcomes. Here's what ecommerce brands get when our marketing services run end to end.

items.title: Content That Has a Point of View
items.text: 40+ human writers create content with real ecommerce expertise. RequestDesk captures your brand voice and manages the entire content pipeline. In a market drowning in AI sludge, content with a real perspective is the differentiator.

items.title: Revenue You Can Trace
items.text: Full HubSpot attribution wired into content. RequestDesk connects content to the CRM so you see which post drove which deal, for which segment. We set up HubSpot Marketing Hub Pro as the engine if you don't have it.

items.title: Visibility Where Buyers Look
items.text: Your products show up in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, email, and social. We optimize for AI search (not just SEO) and distribute across every channel where your buyers spend time.

items.title: A System That Compounds
items.text: Performance data feeds back into optimization. What works gets amplified. What doesn't gets cut. Your marketing compounds over time instead of resetting every quarter.

data.title: Ecommerce specialists with the team and the platform.

highlights.title: 30+ Years in Ecommerce
highlights.text: Led by Brent Peterson, Content Cucumber works exclusively with online brands. We speak at eTail, Shoptalk, and industry events. We host Talk Commerce, a podcast with 500+ episodes featuring ecommerce leaders.

highlights.title: Team and Platform
highlights.text: Content Cucumber is the team. RequestDesk is the platform. Together they run the full marketing system. RequestDesk handles brand voice, content execution, and publishing. HubSpot provides the CRM and attribution layer. We set up everything.

highlights.title: Outcome Pricing
highlights.text: We don't bill hours, points, or fixed deliverables. We scope to the outcome. If hitting the goal takes more content one month and less the next, that's our problem. You get the result either way.

items.question: "How is this different from other marketing agencies?"
items.answer: Two things. First, we scope to outcomes, not hours. You tell us the goal (visibility, leads, revenue) and we run the work to hit it. Second, we wire content directly into HubSpot for real attribution, so every dollar of marketing has a revenue trace. Most agencies sell you a content package and hope it works.

items.question: "Do we need HubSpot already?"
items.answer: No. Most clients don't have HubSpot when they start. We set up HubSpot Marketing Hub Pro as part of the engagement. You get attribution, personalization, and automation. If you're already on HubSpot, we integrate with your existing setup.

items.question: "AI can write our content. Why pay for human writers?"
items.answer: AI produces the same output for every brand using it. When every competitor publishes identical AI content, none of it stands out. Our 40+ human writers create content with real expertise and your brand voice. That's what makes content convert. Tools alone don't.

items.question: "What does the free review include?"
items.answer: A one-page outcome scorecard tied to your revenue goal. We map where pipeline is leaking, where content is missing, how visible you are in AI search, and whether your HubSpot attribution is wired up. You walk away with a prioritized list of what to fix first based on revenue impact. 30-minute call, written deliverable.

items.question: "How does pricing work?"
items.answer: We price based on the outcome, not the work. Each package is scoped to a specific goal: visibility, pipeline, or revenue. Content volume is whatever it takes to hit the outcome. We'll walk you through options on a call and recommend the right fit for your brand and stage.

items.question: "What is RequestDesk?"
items.answer: RequestDesk is our content execution platform. It captures your brand voice, manages your content pipeline, integrates with HubSpot CRM for personalized content, and publishes across Shopify, WordPress, and social channels. It's the content layer that plugs into HubSpot. Content Cucumber is the team that runs it.

data.title: Two Brands, One System

data.title: Ready to scope marketing to an outcome?
data.text: Get a free marketing review for your ecommerce brand. You'll get a one-page outcome scorecard, a prioritized list of revenue gaps, and a clear next step. 30-minute call, written deliverable, no sales pitch. Just an ecommerce team with 30+ years of experience telling you what they see.
